content: Captain Scarlett and Her Pirate's Booty
name: Blood of the Seraphs
description: A Seraph Eridian relic focused on survivability, combining bonus maximum health with steady health regeneration. It is a straightforward sustain option for builds that want more padding and passive recovery.
notes:
It is purchased from the Seraph Vendor in Oasis.

Since the April 2, 2013 update, its variant rolls have been fixed. From patch v1.6.0 on August 29, 2013 onward, both the bonus health and the health regeneration increase with the relic's level.

special.description: Boosts maximum health and regenerates a percentage of that health every second. Both bonuses increase with the relic's level.
special.title: Their power courses through you...
